// transport: The demo runs every resource over plain HTTP on 127.0.0.1. Disable Aspire 13.x automatic developer-certificate HTTPS termination so container HTTP endpoints (Keycloak etc.) are NOT rewritten to terminate TLS with the untrusted ASP.NET dev cert — otherwise the BFF's plaintext OIDC discovery fetch hits a TLS listener and fails with 'The response ended prematurely (ResponseEnded)'.
